html:
2026-0270
2026-03-25GACSpecial Economic Measures ActRegulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Iran) Regulations Regulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Iran) Regulations in order to add five (5) individuals and four (4) entities to Schedule of the Regulations, prohibiting them from transacting business with individuals and businesses in Canada, and freezing their assets unless otherwise authorized by the Minister of the Foreign Affairs.Registration: SOR/2026-0060 Publication Date: 2026-04-08
subject: Regulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Iran) Regulations
precis: Regulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Iran) Regulations in order to add five (5) individuals and four (4) entities to Schedule of the Regulations, prohibiting them from transacting business with individuals and businesses in Canada, and freezing their assets unless otherwise authorized by the Minister of the Foreign Affairs.
